cities.name: Auckland
cities.notes: Sky Tower, Waiheke Island wine, Rangitoto volcano and America's Cup harbour

cities.name: Queenstown
cities.notes: Bungee jumping birthplace, Milford Sound day trip and Remarkables skiing

cities.name: Wellington
cities.notes: Te Papa national museum, Weta Workshop tour and Cuba Street cafe culture

cities.name: Rotorua
cities.notes: Geothermal geysers, Wai-O-Tapu colour pools and Maori haka performance

cities.name: Christchurch
cities.notes: Rebuilt Cardboard Cathedral, Hagley Park and Antarctic Centre gateway

cities.name: Fiordland
cities.notes: Milford Sound and Doubtful Sound by boat through ancient glacier fiords
